seoTitle: Kandanga vs Kangaroo Point — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kandanga and Kangaroo Point. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Kandanga vs Kangaroo Point: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kandanga and Kangaroo Point.
heading: Kandanga vs Kangaroo Point — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kandanga, Queensland and Kangaroo Point, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kandanga has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Kangaroo Point (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kandanga or Kangaroo Point safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kandanga has a flood risk score of 38/100, while Kangaroo Point scores 20/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kandanga scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Kangaroo Point scores 62/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kandanga or Kangaroo Point?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kandanga has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.05% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
